# MuleSoft Manufacturing

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.4) of Manufacturing documentation.
> See [Manufacturing llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/manufacturing/llms-full.txt) for all the Manufacturing documentation in one file.

## Content

- [MuleSoft Accelerator for Manufacturing](https://docs.mulesoft.com/manufacturing/latest/index.md)
- [Accelerator Setup Guide](https://docs.mulesoft.com/manufacturing/latest/mfg-setup-guide.md)
- [OSISoft PI Setup Guide for Productive Maintenance](https://docs.mulesoft.com/manufacturing/latest/osisoft-pi-setup-guide.md)
- [Prerequisites for MuleSoft Accelerator for Manufacturing](https://docs.mulesoft.com/manufacturing/latest/prerequisites.md)
- [SAP S4HANA Setup Guide for Sales Rebate Management](https://docs.mulesoft.com/manufacturing/latest/sap-s4hana-setup-guide.md)
- [SFTP Setup Guide](https://docs.mulesoft.com/manufacturing/latest/sftp-setup-guide.md)
- [Tableau Setup Guide for Productive Maintenance](https://docs.mulesoft.com/manufacturing/latest/tableau-setup-guide.md)
